name: Velvet - Gunsaw (LEGACY)
description:
"I promise, I don't bite~"

Velvet from Gunsaw

Did this take too long?

The second Gunsaw bot. Not my second favourite but figured it would be interesting having a Velvet considering their questionable personality.

To be honest I don't really like how they are depicted in the official art but I haven't really seen anything that would match better. Considering there is little to no fanart of the game.

This one actually deserves a dead dove. I put one on all my bots just in case but... this one might actually need it. So warning.

Y'all can name the bot if you have more creative name ideas, just tell me down bellow, cause' "Ruby" is uhh... too basic.

Up next:

-VOYAGEERRRR

-Chompy maybe idk
creator: ItsBastion
